entity.summary: Native decentralized exchange on Hydra Chain combining V2 automated-market-maker pools with V3 concentrated-liquidity trading, token swaps, liquidity provision, and current on-chain exchange activity.
entity.notes: Current first-party HydraDEX application remains reachable. DefiLlama separately tracks HydraDEX V2 and V3 on the Hydra ecosystem; V3 reports current TVL and non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day exchange volume and fees. HEI consolidates both version rows into one HydraDEX entity and keeps confidence medium because detailed first-party protocol documentation was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: HydraDEX official application
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party HydraDEX application endpoint remains reachable and presents the HydraGon Dex exchange interface.

evidence.title: HydraDEX V3 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile identifies HydraDEX V3 as the native Hydra Chain concentrated-liquidity DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day volume and fee windows, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: HydraDEX V2 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol profile identifies HydraDEX V2 as the Hydra Chain automated-market-maker deployment, reports residual current liquidity and cumulative exchange volume, and supports consolidation of V2 and V3 under one exchange entity.
